name: Yellow Squash Casserole
recipeIngredient: 1 Stick Margarine (1/2 to 1 Cup Vegetable Broth)
2 Cups Cheddar Cheese (Regular or Reduced Fat)
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt margarine in a pan.
2. Add onions and sauté until softened.
3. Crush the cracker roll and add to the cooked onions.
4. Turn off the burner, then stir gently; remove from heat.
5. Layer the deep casserole dish with squash, cracker mixture, and cheese.
6. Repeat layers, ending with squash on top.
7. Bake at 350°F for 35 minutes uncovered, then cover and bake for an additional 10-15 minutes.
